---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme:
      light:
        - jolla
        - styles.scss
      dark:
        - darkly
        - styles-dark.scss
    mainfont: Lexend
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lexend:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <style>
          /* ── Palette variables ────────────────────────── */
          :root {
            --hv-bg:          #F7F8F0;
            --hv-bg-fade:     #F7F8F0;
            --hv-text:        #355872;
            --hv-accent:      #7AAACE;
            --hv-light:       #9CD5FF;
            --hv-card-bg:     #ffffff;
            --hv-card-shadow: rgba(53,88,114,0.08);
            --hv-card-hover:  rgba(53,88,114,0.15);
            --hv-cv-bg:       #355872;
            --hv-cv-text:     #F7F8F0;
            --hv-cv-accent:   #9CD5FF;
          }

          [data-bs-theme="dark"] {
            --hv-bg:          #111111;
            --hv-bg-fade:     #111111;
            --hv-text:        #F7F8F0;
            --hv-accent:      #9CD5FF;
            --hv-light:       #7AAACE;
            --hv-card-bg:     #1c1c1c;
            --hv-card-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            --hv-card-hover:  rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --hv-cv-bg:       #222222;
            --hv-cv-text:     #F7F8F0;
            --hv-cv-accent:   #9CD5FF;
          }

          [data-bs-theme="dark"] .hv-wave svg path { fill: #111111; }

          /* ── Reset & Base ─────────────────────────────── */
          body { margin: 0; background: var(--hv-bg); color: var(--hv-text); }

          #quarto-content, .quarto-container, main {
            max-width: 100% !important;
            padding: 0 !important;
            margin: 0 !important;
          }

          /* ── Hero ─────────────────────────────────────── */
          .hv-hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 4rem 2rem 6rem;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #355872;
          }

          /* subtle radial glow behind the photo */
          .hv-hero::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 30%; left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 500px; height: 500px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(156,213,255,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
          }

          /* wave SVG bleeds into page bg */
          .hv-wave {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
            line-height: 0;
            z-index: 1;
            pointer-events: none;
          }

          .hv-photo-ring {
            width: 180px;
            height: 180px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 2px solid rgba(156,213,255,0.5);
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            animation: fadeUp 1s ease both;
            position: relative; z-index: 2;
          }

          .hv-photo-ring img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            object-position: center 20%;
          }

          .hv-name {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 6vw, 4.5rem);
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
            color: #F7F8F0;
            margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
            animation: fadeUp 1s 0.15s ease both;
            position: relative; z-index: 2;
          }

          .hv-tagline {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: 0.22em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #9CD5FF;
            margin: 0 0 2rem;
            animation: fadeUp 1s 0.3s ease both;
            position: relative; z-index: 2;
          }

          .hv-about {
            max-width: 520px;
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.8;
            color: rgba(247,248,240,0.75);
            margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
            animation: fadeUp 1s 0.45s ease both;
            position: relative; z-index: 2;
          }

          .hv-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            justify-content: center;
            animation: fadeUp 1s 0.6s ease both;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            position: relative; z-index: 2;
          }

          .hv-links a {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.18em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #9CD5FF;
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid currentColor;
            padding-bottom: 2px;
            transition: color 0.2s;
          }

          .hv-links a:hover { color: #F7F8F0; }

          .hv-scroll-hint {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 2.5rem;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            margin: 0 auto;
            width: fit-content;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.4rem;
            animation: fadeUp 1s 1s ease both;
            z-index: 3;
          }

          .hv-scroll-hint span {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: rgba(156,213,255,0.7);
          }

          .hv-scroll-arrow {
            width: 1px;
            height: 28px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(156,213,255,0.7), transparent);
            animation: scrollPulse 2s ease infinite;
          }

          /* ── Section Cards ────────────────────────────── */
          .hv-sections {
            padding: 2rem 2rem 6rem;
            max-width: 860px;
            margin: 0 auto;
          }

          .hv-section-label {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.25em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--hv-light);
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
          }

          .hv-card {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 0;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            background: var(--hv-card-bg);
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 20px var(--hv-card-shadow);
            text-decoration: none;
            color: inherit;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
          }

          .hv-card:nth-child(odd)  { transform: translateX(-48px); }
          .hv-card:nth-child(even) { transform: translateX(48px); }

          .hv-card:nth-child(even) .hv-card-img { order: 2; }
          .hv-card:nth-child(even) .hv-card-body { order: 1; }

          .hv-card.visible {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateX(0);
            transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
          }

          .hv-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 40px var(--hv-card-hover);
          }

          .hv-card-img {
            overflow: hidden;
            max-height: 260px;
          }

          .hv-card-img img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform 0.6s ease;
          }

          .hv-card:hover .hv-card-img img { transform: scale(1.04); }

          .hv-card-body {
            padding: 2.8rem 2.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
          }

          .hv-card-title {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 1.6rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.1;
            color: var(--hv-text);
            margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
          }

          .hv-card-desc {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.7;
            color: var(--hv-accent);
            margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
          }

          .hv-card-cta {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.18em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--hv-accent);
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
          }

          .hv-card-cta::after {
            content: '→';
            transition: transform 0.2s;
          }

          .hv-card:hover .hv-card-cta::after { transform: translateX(4px); }
          .hv-card:hover .hv-card-cta { color: var(--hv-text); }

          /* CV card — full width */
          .hv-card-cv {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
            background: var(--hv-cv-bg);
            color: var(--hv-cv-text);
            text-align: center;
            padding: 3rem 2rem;
            justify-items: center;
          }

          .hv-card-cv .hv-card-title { color: var(--hv-cv-text); }
          .hv-card-cv .hv-card-desc  { color: var(--hv-cv-accent); }
          .hv-card-cv .hv-card-cta   { color: var(--hv-cv-accent); }
          .hv-card-cv:hover .hv-card-cta { color: var(--hv-cv-text); }

          /* ── Education strip ──────────────────────────── */
          .hv-edu {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 3rem 2rem 5rem;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(20px);
            transition: opacity 0.7s, transform 0.7s;
          }

          .hv-edu.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

          .hv-edu-label {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.22em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--hv-light);
            margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
          }

          .hv-edu-degree {
            font-family: 'Lexend', sans-serif;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--hv-text);
          }

          /* ── Animations ───────────────────────────────── */
          @keyframes fadeUp {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
          }

          @keyframes scrollPulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; }
            50%       { opacity: 1; }
          }

          /* ── Responsive ───────────────────────────────── */
          @media (max-width: 640px) {
            .hv-card, .hv-card:nth-child(even) {
              grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
            }
            .hv-card:nth-child(even) .hv-card-img { order: 0; }
            .hv-card:nth-child(even) .hv-card-body { order: 1; }
            .hv-card-img { max-height: 200px; }
          }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hv-hero">
  <div class="hv-photo-ring">
    <img src="images/_ERK4501.jpg" alt="Hayden Vega">
  </div>
  <h1 class="hv-name">Hayden Vega</h1>
  <p class="hv-tagline">Marine Scientist &nbsp;·&nbsp; Writer &nbsp;·&nbsp; Artist</p>
  <p class="hv-about">
    Hi, I'm Hayden! I'm a marine scientist interested in leveraging ecology 
    and environmental-social science to help ecosystems and people.
    I wear many hats as a scientist, writer, artist, teacher, and student.
  </p>
  <div class="hv-links">
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/hayden-vega-6893a3207/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/haydenvega" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    <a href="mailto:haydenvega@ucsb.edu">Email</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hv-scroll-hint">
    <span>explore</span>
    <div class="hv-scroll-arrow"></div>
  </div>
  <!-- wave bleeds into page background -->
  <div class="hv-wave">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 80" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M0,40 C240,80 480,0 720,40 C960,80 1200,10 1440,40 L1440,80 L0,80 Z" fill="#F7F8F0"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SECTION CARDS -->
<div class="hv-sections">
  <p class="hv-section-label">My Work</p>

  <!-- Research -->
  <a class="hv-card" href="research.html">
    <div class="hv-card-img">
      <img src="https://haydenvega.github.io/research/2024-19-12-fisharefriends/dascyllus.png" alt="Research">
    </div>
    <div class="hv-card-body">
      <div class="hv-card-title">Research</div>
      <div class="hv-card-desc">Shark fin morphology, coral-fish mutualisms, macroalgal functional traits and more.</div>
      <div class="hv-card-cta">View research</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <!-- Fieldwork -->
  <a class="hv-card" href="fieldwork.html">
    <div class="hv-card-img">
      <img src="https://haydenvega.github.io/images/auhurra.jpg" alt="Fieldwork">
    </div>
    <div class="hv-card-body">
      <div class="hv-card-title">Fieldwork</div>
      <div class="hv-card-desc">Fieldwork is one of my favorite things about being a scientist. Pictures never do it justice, but here are some photos anyway.</div>
      <div class="hv-card-cta">See photos</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <!-- Outreach -->
  <a class="hv-card" href="posts.html">
    <div class="hv-card-img">
      <img src="https://haydenvega.github.io/blog_posts/FUERTE/bigsnorkel.jpg" alt="Outreach">
    </div>
    <div class="hv-card-body">
      <div class="hv-card-title">Outreach</div>
      <div class="hv-card-desc">My outreach touches science, activism, and nature. And, if nothing else, I hope to use facts and feelings to help others appreciate the world around them a little more.</div>
      <div class="hv-card-cta">Read more</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <!-- Words -->
  <a class="hv-card" href="words.html">
    <div class="hv-card-img">
      <img src="https://haydenvega.github.io/words_posts/eds_240_blog/kelp-pressing.jpg" alt="Words">
    </div>
    <div class="hv-card-body">
      <div class="hv-card-title">Words</div>
      <div class="hv-card-desc">A fried-rice of leftover words about nature, the ocean, and my life that I've cooked up especially for you.</div>
      <div class="hv-card-cta">Read writing</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <!-- CV -->
  <a class="hv-card hv-card-cv" href="cv_hv.pdf" target="_blank">
    <div class="hv-card-body">
      <div class="hv-card-title">CV</div>
      <div class="hv-card-desc">Education, research experience, publications, and more.</div>
      <div class="hv-card-cta">Download PDF</div>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<div class="hv-edu" id="hv-edu">
  <div class="hv-edu-label">Education</div>
  <div class="hv-edu-degree">Ph.D. Candidate Environmental Science, Policy, and Management &nbsp;·&nbsp; University of California, Berkeley</div>
  <div class="hv-edu-degree" style="margin-top: 0.6rem;">B.A. Marine Science &nbsp;·&nbsp; University of California, Santa Barbara</div>
</div>

<script>
  // Intersection Observer for scroll-in animations
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        // Stagger cards slightly
        const delay = entry.target.classList.contains('hv-card')
          ? Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.hv-card')).indexOf(entry.target) * 80
          : 0;
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), delay);
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.hv-card, .hv-edu').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>
```
